purpose: Non-local dark-zone oracle: measures whether an arm's TESTS reach reality (composition root / real boundary) rather than only units/fakes. Complements pipe-core-v1, whose local-logic mutation oracle could not exhibit a differential because both arms catch local defects by construction.
scoring: Per built increment: apply the non-local mutation, run the arm's OWN test suite. RED=caught, GREEN=escaped. Escaped-defect-rate per arm. The defect is invisible to unit/fake-only suites and visible only to suites wired through the real composition root / real boundary.
discrimination_validated: 2026-05-29 — reference suites prove the gap: N1 unit-only ESCAPES + integration CATCHES; N2 fake-only ESCAPES + real-boundary CATCHES. All mutations applied=true; all suites green pre-mutation.

tasks.dark_zone: composition-root wiring: handler correct in isolation but not wired into build_app()
fake-test: real persistence boundary never exercised ('tests green != it works')
tasks.catches: real-boundary smoke test round-tripping through a temp file

constraints: No real network/services. Real boundary = temp file only (tempfile.TemporaryDirectory). FEATURE.md never names the dark zone (no 'wire it through build_app', no 'test the real FileStore') — the tester must choose reality on their own; that choice is exactly what the DNA targets.

arms.dna: agents @HEAD (v4 kritische semantische Glättung + wired-in-prod check + evidence-class ledger)
